creator: takahiro.kurosawa@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 256127
patch for the kernel to allow proxy arp for point-to-point interfaces

I've been using the attached patch for 2 years to add proxy arp entries for VPN interfaces.
The kernel without this patch only allows proxy arps for ng_iface (ngX), that is too restrictive. I'm not sure that this patch is correct, but proxy arps should not be limited for ng_iface.
